name: @soltrade/provider-adapters
description: Unified external-provider adapters (ADR-0001 Phase 2D): Jupiter quotes/routes, Solana RPC read/send/simulate, Jito tip/bundle, Helius DAS metadata, provider-health normalization. Byte-for-byte port of the engine clients; cross-boundary deps (grpc ingestor factory, b58decode, mints, urls) are injected so the package imports neither apps nor services.
